question_intent: Average number of games won by teams in the Campbell Conference that lost more than 10 games against teams in the Eastern Conference

plan.question_intent: Average number of games won by teams in the Campbell Conference that lost more than 10 games against teams in the Eastern Conference
plan.detail_query: SELECT t.tmid AS team_id, t.w AS games_won, COUNT(tv.oppid) AS games_lost FROM teams AS t JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON t.tmid = tv.tmid JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid JOIN abbrev AS ca ON t.confid = ca.code JOIN abbrev AS oa ON ot.confid = oa.code WHERE ca.fullname = 'Campbell Conference' AND oa.fullname = 'Eastern Conference' AND tv.l > 10 GROUP BY t.tmid, t.w HAVING COUNT(tv.oppid) > 10

SELECT t.tmid AS team_id, t.w AS games_won, COUNT(tv.oppid) AS games_lost
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON t.tmid = tv.tmid
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON t.confid = ca.code
JOIN abbrev AS oa ON ot.confid = oa.code
WHERE (ca.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (oa.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tv.l < 10)
GROUP BY t.tmid, t.w
HAVING (COUNT(tv.oppid) > 10)

build_logs.notes: This block calculates the average number of games won by teams in the Campbell Conference that lost more than 10 games to teams in the Eastern Conference

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t.tmid AS team_id, t.w AS games_won, COUNT(tv.oppid) AS games_lost
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON t.tmid = tv.tmid
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON t.confid = ca.code
JOIN abbrev AS oa ON ot.confid = oa.code
WHERE (ca.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (oa.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tv.l < 10)
GROUP BY t.tmid, t.w
HAVING (COUNT(tv.oppid) > 0)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.games_won)
FROM (SELECT t.tmid AS team_id, t.w AS games_won, COUNT(tv.oppid) AS games_lost
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON t.tmid = tv.tmid
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON t.confid = ca.code
JOIN abbrev AS oa ON ot.confid = oa.code
WHERE (ca.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (oa.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tv.l < 10)
GROUP BY t.tmid, t.w
HAVING (COUNT(tv.oppid) > 0)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT a.fullname
FROM (SELECT t.confid, MAX(t.w) AS max_wins
FROM teams t
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
WHERE (s.year >= 1985)
GROUP BY t.confid) AS leaf_1
JOIN teams t ON leaf_1.confid = t.confid
JOIN seriespost s ON t.tmid = s.tmidwinner AND t.year = s.year
JOIN abbrev a ON leaf_1.confid = a.code
WHERE (s.year = 1985 OR s.year = 1986)

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.goalswinner)
FROM (SELECT sp.year, sp.round, sp.series, sp.tmidwinner, sp.goalswinner, c.coachid, a.award
FROM seriespost AS sp
JOIN teams AS t ON sp.tmidwinner = t.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (sp.round = 'QF') AND (a.award = 'First Team All-Star')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average number of games won by Campbell Conference teams in matchups against Eastern Conference teams where the Campbell Conference team lost fewer than 10 games?
